datapacks.name: Pummelchen Welcome
datapacks.notes: Replaces Gamingbarn's Guns and Chems' Guns welcome dialogs with a Pummelchen Server welcome screen. Disables Raid Mode permanently. Enforces new-world safety gamerules: no generated bonus chest, keep inventory, no mob griefing, no projectile block breaking, no TNT explosions, and full block drops.
